--analysisPbs.help: Submit coinjoin-analysis as a PBS job on MetaCentrum.

--blocksci-script.help: Run a Python script after BlockSci parsing. The script receives ACTIVE_RUN_ID, BLOCKSCI_CONFIG, and BLOCKSCI_RUN_DIR in its environment and runs with the run directory as cwd.

--blocksciPbs.help: Submit BlockSci analysis as a PBS job on MetaCentrum.

--dry-run.help: Print the selected pipeline stages and exit without side effects.

--engine.help: CoinJoin emulator engine to run. Select explicitly: wasabi or joinmarket.

--joinmarket-detector.help: BlockSci JoinMarket subset detector to use when --coinjoin-type joinmarket (default: definite).

--joinmarket-max-depth.help: Maximum subset-search depth for the JoinMarket detector (default: 200000).

--joinmarket-min-base-fee.help: Minimum base fee for the JoinMarket detector (default: 5000).

--joinmarket-percentage-fee.help: Percentage fee for the JoinMarket detector (default: 4e-05).

--mappingsPbs.help: Submit the Wasabi mapping enumerator and Sake as one PBS job.

--min-input-count.help: Minimum transaction input count considered by detection (default: BlockSci height/test-mode threshold).

--pbs-bitcoin-datadir.help: Shared /storage Bitcoin Core datadir for BlockSci PBS jobs. It must contain regtest/blocks. Can also be set with PBS_BITCOIN_DATADIR.

--pbs-blocksci-image.help: Singularity image for BlockSci PBS jobs (default: docker://ghcr.io/ondrejman/blocksci-complete:latest).

--pbs-coinjoin-analysis-image.help: Singularity image for coinjoin-analysis PBS jobs (default: docker://ghcr.io/ondrejman/coinjoin-analysis:latest).

--pbs-image.help: Singularity image override for either PBS stage.

--pbs-mem.help: Memory for the PBS job (default: 64gb for BlockSci, 16gb for coinjoin-analysis).

--pbs-ncpus.help: Number of CPUs for the PBS job (default: 8 for BlockSci, 4 for coinjoin-analysis).

--pbs-scratch.help: Scratch storage for the PBS job (default: 100gb for BlockSci, 50gb for coinjoin-analysis).

--pbs-walltime.help: Walltime for the PBS job (default: 24:00:00 for BlockSci, 04:00:00 for coinjoin-analysis).

--run-dir.help: Emulation run folder name or path.

--scenario.help: Fallback scenario JSON if the run folder has no scenario.json.

--dry-run.help: Print the selected pipeline stages and exit without side effects.

--yes.help: Confirm removal of runtime containers and volumes.

--all-runs.help: Analyze every run folder under the emulation logs root.

--analysis-action.help: Extract emulator artifacts and analyze them (collect_docker), or rerun analysis from an existing coinjoin_tx_info.json (analyze_only).

--analysisPbs.help: Submit coinjoin-analysis as a PBS job on MetaCentrum.

--blocksciPbs.help: Submit BlockSci analysis as a PBS job on MetaCentrum.

--dry-run.help: Print the selected pipeline stages and exit without side effects.

--mappingsPbs.help: Submit the Wasabi mapping enumerator and Sake as one PBS job.

--pbs-bitcoin-datadir.help: Shared /storage Bitcoin Core datadir for BlockSci PBS jobs. It must contain regtest/blocks. Can also be set with PBS_BITCOIN_DATADIR.

--pbs-blocksci-image.help: Singularity image for BlockSci PBS jobs (default: docker://ghcr.io/ondrejman/blocksci-complete:latest).

--pbs-coinjoin-analysis-image.help: Singularity image for coinjoin-analysis PBS jobs (default: docker://ghcr.io/ondrejman/coinjoin-analysis:latest).

--pbs-image.help: Singularity image override for either PBS stage.

--pbs-mem.help: Memory for the PBS job (default: 64gb for BlockSci, 16gb for coinjoin-analysis).

--pbs-ncpus.help: Number of CPUs for the PBS job (default: 8 for BlockSci, 4 for coinjoin-analysis).

--pbs-scratch.help: Scratch storage for the PBS job (default: 100gb for BlockSci, 50gb for coinjoin-analysis).

--pbs-walltime.help: Walltime for the PBS job (default: 24:00:00 for BlockSci, 04:00:00 for coinjoin-analysis).

--run-dir.help: Emulation run folder name or path.

--dry-run.help: Print the selected pipeline stages and exit without side effects.

--engine.help: CoinJoin emulator engine to run. Select explicitly: wasabi or joinmarket.

--joinmarket-detector.help: BlockSci JoinMarket subset detector to use when --coinjoin-type joinmarket (default: definite).

--joinmarket-max-depth.help: Maximum subset-search depth for the JoinMarket detector (default: 200000).

--joinmarket-min-base-fee.help: Minimum base fee for the JoinMarket detector (default: 5000).

--joinmarket-percentage-fee.help: Percentage fee for the JoinMarket detector (default: 4e-05).

--min-input-count.help: Minimum transaction input count considered by detection (default: BlockSci height/test-mode threshold).

--run-dir.help: Emulation run folder name or path.

--scenario.help: Fallback scenario JSON if the run folder has no scenario.json.

--blocksci-image.help: BlockSci container image used for parsing and reporting.

--false-cjtxs.help: Confirmed false-positive JSON file; repeat for fragments. By default, false_cjtxs.json* files next to --baseline are imported automatically.

--min-free-gb.help: Minimum free space required for the persistent BlockSci index (default: 20 GiB).

--network.help: Blockchain network interpreted by BlockSci (default: bitcoin).

--analysisPbs.help: Submit coinjoin-analysis as a PBS job on MetaCentrum.

--artifact-uri.help: S3-compatible run prefix, for example s3://bucket/runs.

--blocksci-cache-source-run-id.help: Existing S3 run ID whose verified blocksci-parse_data cache is the input to --blocksci-task update. The updated cache is written to --run-id.

--blocksci-external-bitcoin-datadir.help: Parse an external Bitcoin Core coin directory under /storage; the directory must contain blocks/.

--blocksci-external-blocksci-dir.help: Import an existing BlockSci directory under /storage containing config.json and parsed/.

--blocksci-max-block.help: Inclusive maximum block height for external Bitcoin parsing.

--blocksci-notebook-port.help: Jupyter port on the assigned PBS node (default: 8888).

--blocksci-notebooks-dir.help: Optional shared /storage directory mounted read-write as /mnt/notebooks; otherwise notebooks are uploaded under blocksci-notebooks_data/.

--blocksci-script.help: Run a Python script after BlockSci parsing. The script receives ACTIVE_RUN_ID, BLOCKSCI_CONFIG, and BLOCKSCI_RUN_DIR in its environment and runs with the run directory as cwd.

--blocksci-task.help: BlockSci work to run; parse publishes a reusable cache and update incrementally advances an external-Bitcoin cache (default: detect).

--blocksci-workflow.help: BlockSci S3 workflow: combined parses and analyzes in one PBS job; reusable publishes a cache then submits dependent work; cached reuses an already published blocksci-parse_data cache.

--blocksciPbs.help: Submit BlockSci analysis as a PBS job on MetaCentrum.

--coinjoin-infrastructure-local-build.help: Build btc-node, JoinMarket client-server, and IRC server locally inside the emulator runtime.

--copy-to-host.help: Use the legacy pod-to-wrapper Bitcoin datadir download instead of writing directly to shared storage.

--driver.help: Container orchestration driver for the emulation step. 'docker' uses Docker-in-Docker via compose (default). 'kubernetes' runs the emulation pods on a Kubernetes cluster.

--dry-run.help: Print the selected pipeline stages and exit without side effects.

--emulation-timeout.help: Seconds to wait for the Kubernetes S3-compatible emulation upload marker (S3 backend only).

--engine.help: CoinJoin emulator engine to run. Select explicitly: wasabi or joinmarket.

--image-prefix.help: Image registry prefix for Kubernetes pods (default: ghcr.io/ondrejman/).

--joinmarket-detector.help: BlockSci JoinMarket subset detector to use when --coinjoin-type joinmarket (default: definite).

--joinmarket-max-depth.help: Maximum subset-search depth for the JoinMarket detector (default: 200000).

--joinmarket-min-base-fee.help: Minimum base fee for the JoinMarket detector (default: 5000).

--joinmarket-percentage-fee.help: Percentage fee for the JoinMarket detector (default: 4e-05).

--kubernetes-btc-datadir.help: Shared absolute Bitcoin Core datadir mounted directly into the Kubernetes btc-node pod. Defaults to --pbs-bitcoin-datadir when set.

--mappingsPbs.help: Submit the Wasabi mapping enumerator and Sake as one PBS job.

--min-input-count.help: Minimum transaction input count considered by detection (default: BlockSci height/test-mode threshold).

--namespace.help: Kubernetes namespace for emulation pods (default: coinjoin).

--parallel.help: Run BlockSci and coinjoin-analysis concurrently after emulation.

--pbs-bitcoin-datadir.help: Shared /storage Bitcoin Core datadir for BlockSci PBS jobs. It must contain regtest/blocks. Can also be set with PBS_BITCOIN_DATADIR.

--pbs-blocksci-image.help: Singularity image for BlockSci PBS jobs (default: docker://ghcr.io/ondrejman/blocksci-complete:latest).

--pbs-coinjoin-analysis-image.help: Singularity image for coinjoin-analysis PBS jobs (default: docker://ghcr.io/ondrejman/coinjoin-analysis:latest).

--pbs-image.help: Singularity image override for either PBS stage.

--pbs-mem.help: Memory for the PBS job (default: 64gb for BlockSci, 16gb for coinjoin-analysis).

--pbs-ncpus.help: Number of CPUs for the PBS job (default: 8 for BlockSci, 4 for coinjoin-analysis).

--pbs-scratch.help: Scratch storage for the PBS job (default: 100gb for BlockSci, 50gb for coinjoin-analysis).

--pbs-unified-report-mem.help: Memory for the unified-report PBS job (default: 8gb; overrides --pbs-mem).

--pbs-unified-report-ncpus.help: CPU count for the unified-report PBS job (default: 2; overrides --pbs-ncpus).

--pbs-unified-report-scratch.help: Scratch storage for the unified-report PBS job (default: 10gb; overrides --pbs-scratch).

--pbs-unified-report-walltime.help: Walltime for the unified-report PBS job (default: 01:00:00; overrides --pbs-walltime).

--pbs-walltime.help: Walltime for the PBS job (default: 24:00:00 for BlockSci, 04:00:00 for coinjoin-analysis).

--reuse-namespace.help: Reuse an existing Kubernetes namespace instead of creating a new one.

--run-timezone.help: IANA timezone used in newly created run directory names (default: Europe/Prague).

--s3-credentials-file.help: Absolute s5cmd credentials-file path for PBS jobs.

--s3-profile.help: Named profile in the s5cmd credentials file.

--s3-secret-name.help: Pre-created Kubernetes Secret for S3-compatible upload.

--dry-run.help: Print the selected pipeline stages and exit without side effects.
